declarations.name: levenshtein
declarations.description:
Standard Levenshtein distance. Used for "did you mean…" suggestions.
Adjacent transposition counts as 2 edits (insertion + deletion); good
enough for short command names where typos are usually substitutions.

declarations.name: parseInput
declarations.description:
Parse raw input from `<tui-prompt-input>`. The first whitespace-separated
token is the command name (with any leading slashes stripped); the rest is
the argument string (with its internal whitespace preserved).

declarations.name: defineCommands
declarations.description:
Runtime XOR validation: a Command must have exactly one of `route` or
`handler`. TypeScript already enforces this at compile time, but raw
JS callers (or `as any` escape hatches) can violate the invariant —
this catches that.

members.name: match
members.description:
Resolve a raw input string to a matched command + args. Tries
decreasing-length leading-token prefixes so multi-word aliases like
`aliases: ['ls posts']` match `"ls posts new my-post"`.

members.name: suggest
members.description: Suggest the closest command name when input doesn't match anything.

members.name: completions
members.description:
Prefix-match completion candidates for tab completion.
If no args have been typed yet, suggests command names + aliases.
Otherwise delegates to the matched command's `completions?` callback.

declarations.description: `<tui-box>` — Box frame with rounded or sharp corners.
declarations.name: TuiBox

attributes.description: Optional title rendered in the top chrome
attributes.name: title

cssParts.description: Reserved (unused in this implementation; native caret renders)
cssParts.name: cursor

members.name: onNavigate
members.description: Callback `(url: string) => void`; default sets window.location.href

events.name: tui-command-error
events.description: `{ command, args, error }` on handler rejection

declarations.description:
`<tui-prompt-line>` — Static `›` prompt with optional command + cursor.
Display-only (no input handling — see `<tui-prompt-input>` for that).
declarations.name: TuiPromptLine

attributes.description: Command text rendered after the prompt
attributes.name: command

attributes.description: Show a blinking cursor at the end
attributes.name: cursor

declarations.description: `<tui-spinner>` — Inline TUI spinner with several glyph styles.
declarations.name: TuiSpinner

slots.description: Extra content rendered before the segments
slots.name: left

slots.description: Extra content rendered after the segments
slots.name: right

declarations.description:
`<tui-streamed-text>` — char-by-char CSS reveal of slotted text.

Non-destructive: the slotted light DOM is never mutated. Text is mirrored
into shadow DOM as per-char `<span part="char">`s with inline
`animation-delay`. The light-DOM `<slot>` is `aria-hidden` + visually
hidden so AT only announces the mirror.
declarations.name: TuiStreamedText

cssParts.description: Each per-character span in the mirror
cssParts.name: char

slots.description: Text content (inline phrasing only — block content unsupported in v1)

members.name: interrupt
members.description:
Interrupt the in-progress reveal — fire tui-stream-interrupt and snap
to the fully-revealed state. Safe to call after completion (no-op).

attributes.description: Initial delay before the reveal starts (ms)
attributes.name: delay

attributes.description: Skip animation if this exact text has been animated before in this session (sessionStorage marker)
attributes.name: skip-on-revisit

declarations.description:
`<tui-theme-provider>` — wraps a subtree and applies a theme via CSS custom
properties on `:host`. Variables inherit into both shadow children and
slotted light-DOM children.
declarations.name: TuiThemeProvider

events.name: tui-theme-change
events.description: `{ from, to }` when the theme changes

declarations.description: `<tui-todo-item>` — Single item in a TUI todo list.
declarations.name: TuiTodoItem

declarations.description:
`<tui-todo-list>` — Dumb list container. Items register themselves via
shadow DOM slot — the list does NOT query or aggregate children.
declarations.name: TuiTodoList

slots.description: Optional body content (rendered below the head)
